verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I'm Gonna Love you Love you Lord Lord I'm Gonna Love you Love you Lord Lord I'm Gonna Love you With all that's in my heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I'm Gonna Follow Follow you Lord I'm Gonna Follow Follow you Lord I'm Gonna Follow you With all that's in my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I'm Gonna Worship Worship you Lord I'm Gonna Worship Worship you Lord I'm Gonna Worship you With all that's in my heart
